subcodes.first_line: A Call hath been raised, yet few indeed are they that hearken. The horizon of the world is illumined with the splendors of the Most Great Name, radiant and manifest, yet few are they that behold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندآء مرتفع ولکن سامعین قلیلین افق عالم بانوار اسم اعظم مشرق و لائح ولکن صاحب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Greatest Name
